label: Transferable sorter
description: Defines a sort criterion for the trade, caravan loading, and similar transferable-item dialogs. Binds a display label to a TransferableComparer implementation class.

comparerClass.label: Comparer class
comparerClass.description: C# TransferableComparer subclass that implements the comparison logic for this sort criterion.

new-transferable-sorter.label: New transferable sorter
new-transferable-sorter.description: A minimal transferable sorter with a comparer class.
